stemHtml: Absolute instability in the atmosphere will occur when the environmental lapse rate is

options.a: less than both saturated adiabatic lapse rate and dry adiabatic lapse rate
options.b: greater than both saturated adiabatic lapse rate and dry adiabatic lapse rate
options.c: less than saturated adiabatic lapse rate
options.d: greater than saturated adiabatic lapse rate but less than dry adiabatic lapse rate
